# intersect(with:)

**Instance Method**

Reduces the voxel array to cover only the volume within both it and another voxel array.

## Declaration

```swift
func intersect(with voxels: MDLVoxelArray)
```

## Parameters

- **voxels**: The voxel array to intersect with this voxel array.

## Discussion

After an intersection operation, the voxel array contains only those voxels that were present in both the original array and the specified array. That is, an intersection operation creates a voxel array representing only the space where two volumes overlap.

Performing a union, intersection, or difference operation clears out shell level information from all voxels in the array. (That is, the w component of every [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLVoxelIndex] value in the voxel array is reset to 0.)

## Performing Constructive Solid Geometry Operations

- **union(with:)**: Extends the voxel array to also cover the volume of the specified voxel array.
- **difference(with:)**: Reduces the voxel array to cover only the portion of its volume not covered by another voxel array.
